phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la collection Magritte ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lah koh-lek-SYOHN mah-GREET
phrases.cultural_note: The museum houses the world's largest Magritte collection — over 200 works including 'The Treachery of Images' ('This is not a pipe').

responses.english: The Magritte collection is in the building on the right, level -1.
responses.phonetic: lah koh-lek-SYON mah-GREET eh dahn luh bah-tee-MAHN ah DRWAHT, nee-VOH mwahn UHN
responses.french: La collection Magritte est dans le bâtiment à droite, niveau -1.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the free entry day
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un jour de visite gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un zhoor duh vee-ZEET grah-teet
phrases.cultural_note: Entry is free every Wednesday after 1pm, and the first Sunday of each month. Otherwise, standard adult tickets are €10.

responses.english: Free the first Sunday of the month and Wednesdays after 1pm.
responses.phonetic: grah-TWEE luh pruh-MYAY dee-MAHNSH doo MWAH ay luh mehr-kruh-DEE ah-PREH trez UHR
responses.french: Gratuit le premier dimanche du mois et le mercredi après treize heures.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un jardin de sculptures ?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum has a small sculpture garden behind the building. It's free to access and a peaceful spot in summer months.

responses.english: Yes, at the back of the museum. Access is free.
responses.phonetic: wee, ah lah-RYEHR doo myoo-ZAY. lak-SEH eh grah-TWEE
responses.french: Oui, à l'arrière du musée. L'accès est gratuit.

phrases.cultural_note: There's underground parking at the museum (entrance on Rue du Musée). It's convenient but costs around €4/hour.

responses.english: Yes, under the museum. The entrance is on Rue de la Régence.
responses.phonetic: wee, soo luh myoo-ZAY. lahn-TRAY eh roo duh lah ray-ZHAHNS
responses.french: Oui, sous le musée. L'entrée est rue de la Régence.
